fair_mast_ingestion_mapping.notes: XPC_FA DRIVE is commented as P6 voltage from analog control, but published Level-2 for 30201 (and checked peers 30420/23822/28000) only materialises four channels — XPC_FA DRIVE is absent from the public zarr. P3 is not in the L2 voltage mapping at all.

level1_amc.notes: AMC is currents-only for P3/P6 on this shot; no amc *voltage* arrays.

level1_xpc.notes: No public L1 xpc group; cannot recover XPC_FA DRIVE from S3.

level1_xdc.notes: L1 xdc for 30201 has shape/density control signals only — not /xdc/pf/f/*.

level1_xma_p6_volts.reason: Magnitude ~40 mV vs Level-2 PF supply voltages of hundreds–thousands of volts; no published calibration to coil terminal V. Do not invent a scale factor.

p3_voltage.notes: No P3 entry in FAIR L2 coil_voltage mapping; no L1 amc/xpc voltage for P3.
